enemies.name: Ring Enforcer
enemies.lore: The Tallow Ring runs the docks after dark. This one collects debts and breaks bones in equal measure.

enemies.name: Dock Thug
enemies.lore: Hired muscle, no questions asked. The Harbor Ward employs a lot of those.

enemies.name: Contraband Runner
enemies.lore: Runs crates for the Ring. Knows every gap in the Compact's inspection routes.

enemies.name: Compact Levy
enemies.lore: Civic Compact muscle pressed into service. Half-trained and nervous — which makes them dangerous.

enemies.name: House Guard
enemies.lore: Livery of a creditor house. Well-equipped and trained to intimidate first, escalate if needed.

enemies.name: Debt Collector
enemies.lore: Carries a ledger and a blade. The ledger is more dangerous.

enemies.name: Court Warden
enemies.lore: Gilded Court auxiliary. Everything done by procedure — including violence.

enemies.name: Creditor's Agent
enemies.lore: Sent to recover assets. Flexible definition of assets.

enemies.name: Strikebreaker
enemies.lore: Hired by management to discourage labor action. Experienced at controlled brutality.

enemies.name: Slag Gang Runner
enemies.lore: One of the Ironworks gangs that controls raw material flows. Territorial.

enemies.name: Guild Enforcer
enemies.lore: The tradesmen's guilds have their own enforcers. Not all labor disputes favor the worker.

enemies.name: Arms Thief
enemies.lore: The forges produce weapons. Some people decide to take a cut off the top.

enemies.name: Territory Broker
enemies.lore: The Pale is contested ground. This one claims a piece of it.

enemies.name: Rogue Mercenary
enemies.lore: Between contracts and out of money. Desperation is its own kind of violence.

enemies.name: Pale Scavenger
enemies.lore: Picks the grey zone for anything valuable. Has learned to fight for what's found.

enemies.name: Opportunist
enemies.lore: No faction, no loyalty. Just watching for the moment the odds shift.

enemies.name: Mob Conscript
enemies.lore: The Warrens are close to boiling. This one got swept up in something bigger than them.

enemies.name: Street Enforcer
enemies.lore: Collects from local residents on behalf of someone further up the chain.

enemies.name: Gang Runner
enemies.lore: Young, reckless, trying to prove something to people who won't remember it.

enemies.name: Desperate Thief
enemies.lore: Hunger and humiliation make people take risks. This one is past the point of caution.

enemies.name: Ruin Stalker
enemies.lore: Adapted to the collapsed city. Patient, territorial, and very used to violence.

enemies.name: Hollow Predator
enemies.lore: The Hollows have things that were human once. This one's not all the way back.

enemies.name: Salvage Raider
enemies.lore: Kills first and strips the corpse second. It's just efficiency out here.

enemies.name: Hollows Warlord
enemies.lore: Controls a block or two of rubble. Defends it with remarkable ferocity.

enemies.name: Customs Enforcer
enemies.lore: House Merrow runs customs here. Their enforcers treat the authority as an income stream.

enemies.name: Quay Extortionist
enemies.lore: Every ship that docks pays. Everyone who walks the quay pays. It's a tradition.

enemies.name: Creditor's Collector
enemies.lore: Ash Quay is creditor country. This one is here to make a collection.

enemies.name: Dock Gang Member
enemies.lore: Works the piers on behalf of a protection syndicate. Prefers not to work too hard for it.

enemies.name: Shrine Watcher
enemies.lore: The sanctuaries here are monitored. Not always by the faithful.

enemies.name: Zealot Enforcer
enemies.lore: Doctrine-first, questions later. The Mireward's cults have very clear ideas about outsiders.

enemies.name: Cult Operative
enemies.lore: Doing the congregation's work in ways the congregation would prefer not to know about.

enemies.name: Confession Extractor
enemies.lore: The birth records and confessionals hold leverage on half the city. This one trades in it.

enemies.name: Cartel Runner
enemies.lore: Cinder Row's information market feeds the cartels. This one is on an errand.

enemies.name: Tavern Enforcer
enemies.lore: The tavern owner hired protection. The protection decided it ran the place.

enemies.name: Labor Press-Gang
enemies.lore: Cinder Row labor gets pressed into hazardous work. They resist, sometimes violently.

enemies.name: Information Broker's Guard
enemies.lore: What's known here is currency. What's known here is worth protecting.

enemies.name: Civic Warden
enemies.lore: Northbank law enforcement. By-the-book until someone pays them to be otherwise.

enemies.name: Court Investigator
enemies.lore: The legal machinery of Valdenmoor starts here. This one is investigating something.

enemies.name: Registry Guard
enemies.lore: The records halls have guards. The records are worth more than most people.

enemies.name: Debt Enforcer
enemies.lore: The Northbank handles legal debt recovery. The legal part is negotiable.

enemies.name: Oath Collector
enemies.lore: Oaths sworn in the Below are binding. This one enforces them.

enemies.name: Night Stalker
enemies.lore: Moves through the underground without a face or a name. Very few people see them twice.

enemies.name: Debt Taker
enemies.lore: The Below runs on obligation. This one is here to collect what's owed.

enemies.name: Shadow Broker
enemies.lore: No-face-names are currency down here. This one knows too many of them to be unarmed.
